title: wildling CLI template
description: JSON loaded by wildling --template. Docs-only contract for authors; ports parse a subset with their stdlib JSON.

patterns.description: One or more patterns to expand (merged with CLI pattern args).

oneOf.description: Path to a dictionary file (one word per line).

range.description: Inclusive index ranges as "start-end" strings (same as --range).

check.description: If true, print generation info instead of combinations (same as --check).
